Now I understand what the filter does:
1. Removes `<script>` tags
2. Removes `<frame>`, `<iframe>`, `<object>`, `<embed>` tags
3. Removes any attributes starting with "on" (like onclick, onload, etc.)

I need to find a way to execute JavaScript that bypasses these filters. Let me check the test file and experiment.
